# thoth_evidence_backfill (Resource)

Backfills governance evidence records from Thoth behavioral events.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `dry_run` (Boolean) When true, preview records without persisting evidence.
- `include_blocked_events` (Boolean) Include blocked decisions in addition to explicit violations.
- `integration_id` (String) Optional integration ID stamped on created evidence records.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of candidate events to evaluate (1-1000).
- `trigger` (String) Change this value to force a re-run.

### Read-Only

- `candidates` (Number) Number of events that qualified for backfill.
- `created` (Number) Number of new evidence records created.
- `evidence_ids_json` (String) Created or candidate evidence IDs as JSON array.
- `examined` (Number) Number of source events examined.
- `executed_at` (String) Timestamp when backfill was executed.
- `id` (String) Synthetic execution ID.
- `skipped_existing` (Number) Number of candidates skipped due to existing evidence.
- `source_collection` (String) Source collection used by the backfill endpoint.
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `would_create` (Number) Number of records that would be created in dry-run mode.
